column1: # Release partition table. Based on ESP-IDF's partitions_singleapp_large.csv
# app partition is grown from 1500K to 2048K: the base app already sat at ~97% of 1500K
# GC9A01 boot splash (a ~115 KB embedded RGB565 image) pushed it over. The chip is 8 MB with no
# ESP32-side OTA slots (updates reflash the whole RP2040 combined image)
# flash above factory (0x210000) and this only raises the ceiling -- the flashed binary stays its
